## Summary

Describe the user-visible outcome and why the change belongs in Tracks.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes.
- [ ] Relevant parser, server, CLI, or UI behavior was tested.

## Privacy checklist

- [ ] No real session payloads, prompts, source code, credentials, or private URLs are included.
- [ ] Fixtures and screenshots use synthetic, neutral data.
- [ ] No contributor home paths, private project names, or personal identifiers are included.
- [ ] Logs and error examples are redacted.
- [ ] New network or persistence behavior is documented and reviewed.
